mapper.update:
update articles
title = #{articles.title},
author_name = #{articles.authorName},
category_id = #{articles.categoryId},
status = #{articles.status},
cover_image = #{articles.coverImage},
summary = #{articles.summary},
is_finished = #{articles.isFinished},
update_by = #{articles.updateBy},
cover_object_name = #{articles.coverObjectName},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into articles (title, author_name, category_id, cover_image, summary, word_count, chapter_count, is_finished, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, cover_object_name) values (#{title}, #{authorName}, #{categoryId}, #{coverImage}, #{summary}, #{wordCount}, #{chapterCount}, #{isFinished}, #{status}, now(), now(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{coverObjectName})
mapper.update: update articles set word_count = #{wordCount}, chapter_count = #{chapterCount}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update articles set is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = now(), deleted_by = #{adminId} where id = #{articleId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select a.id, a.title, a.author_name as authorName, c.name as categoryName, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.summary, a.word_count as wordCount, a.chapter_count as chapterCount, a.status, a.update_time as updateTime, a.is_finished as isFinished, case a.is_finished when 0 then '封禁' when 1 then '完结' when 2 then '连载' when 3 then '停更' else '未知' end as isFinishedDesc, a.cover_object_name from articles a inner join categories c on c.id = a.category_id where a.id = #{articleId} and a.is_deleted = 0

select c.id, c.article_id, c.chapter_index, c.title, c.start_paragraph, c.end_paragraph, c.word_count, c.status, c.source_url, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.display_order, c.is_paragraphs_complete from chapters c inner join articles a on a.id = c.article_id where c.article_id = #{articleId} and a.is_deleted = 0 order by c.display_order asc, c.chapter_index asc
select id, title, status, is_deleted as isDeleted, deleted_at as deletedAt, deleted_by as deletedBy, update_time as updateTime, update_by as updateBy from articles where id = #{id}

select id, is_deleted as isDeleted from articles where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update articles set status = 2, is_deleted = 0, deleted_at = null, deleted_by = null, update_time = now(), update_by = #{adminId} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
mapper.select: select a.id, a.title, a.author_name as authorName, c.name as categoryName, a.chapter_count as chapterCount, a.deleted_at as deletedAt from articles a left join categories c on c.id = a.category_id where a.is_deleted = 1 order by a.deleted_at desc
